header: Teams that bought the creators' time
total_reviews: From teams on Pro, Agency, and Creator Care

reviews.author: Daniel R., agency lead
reviews.title: The Launch bundle paid for itself in week one
reviews.review_text: We booked the €1,790 Launch bundle — Pro license, installation, editor workshop. The creators had us live in four days, and our editors were building pages on their own by Friday. Saving €280 on top felt almost unfair.

reviews.author: Priya N., product owner
reviews.title: Pro support answers like the docs wish they could
reviews.review_text: Two-day response in practice means next morning. Every LTS compatibility update has landed before we even planned for it, and early access to the preset packs keeps our designers happy. €490 a year is a rounding error for what it saves us.

reviews.author: Marcus L., CTO
reviews.title: Brand adaptation done properly
reviews.review_text: We ordered the custom theme preset and got our corporate identity as OKLCH tokens — dark mode included, contrast WCAG 2.2-checked like the stock presets. One star off only because we wish we had ordered it at kickoff instead of retrofitting.

reviews.author: Sofia B., site owner
reviews.title: Creator Care is the cheapest insurance we carry
reviews.review_text: Four dev hours a month at €490 sounds modest — until the people who built all 244 elements are the ones using them. Priority fixes, security monitoring, and our next LTS upgrade was planned months ahead of schedule.
